report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Tokenomics Guide 2026 (822 lines, intermediate, DeFi) and Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 (879 lines, intermediate, Trading), with full SEO metadata, Article+FAQPage structured data, comparison tables, and data page entries.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Tokenomics: Researched core components (supply mechanics, distribution, vesting, inflation/deflation, utility/governance), 2026 trends (revenue-backed models, AI agent tokens, fractional ownership), red flags checklist (team cliff <12mo, insider >30%, unlimited supply), and real data (March 2026 $6B+ unlocks, WhiteBIT $4.18B cliff event)

Portfolio Rebalancing: Researched rebalancing strategies (time-based, threshold-based with 15% optimal sweet spot, hybrid, AI-powered), diversification frameworks (BTC+ETH core 40-60%, L1/L2 15-25%, mid-cap 10-20%), automated tools (Shrimpy, Coinrule, 3Commas, WunderTrading), and performance data (1-3% annual risk-adjusted return improvement)

sections.title: Content Created
items: Tokenomics Guide 2026 (822 lines, ~2800 words): 9 sections covering supply mechanics, distribution & vesting, inflation vs deflation, token utility & governance, red flags checklist with color-coded warnings, 2026 trends (real yield, AI agents, March 2026 cliff case study), complete evaluation framework, and 6-question FAQ

Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 (879 lines, ~2700 words): 9 sections covering rebalancing fundamentals, strategy comparison table (time vs threshold vs hybrid), target allocation frameworks (conservative/balanced/aggressive), automated tool analysis with pros/cons, tax & fee considerations, step-by-step guide, common mistakes, and 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Tokenomics: Title 'Tokenomics Guide 2026 — How to Evaluate Crypto Token Economics | degen0x' (59 chars), target keyword 'tokenomics guide 2026', Article + FAQPage schemas with 6 FAQ items, OG article metadata, internal links to staking/yield-farming/DAO-governance/flash-loans guides

Rebalancing: Title 'Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide 2026 — Strategies & Tools | degen0x' (60 chars), target keyword 'crypto portfolio rebalancing guide 2026', Article + FAQPage schemas with 6 FAQ items, OG article metadata, internal links to staking/yield-farming/tax/dex-aggregators guides

sections.title: Data Entries
